# --output-jsonv2 makes unmarshalJSON(body) use encoding/json/v2 UnmarshalRead.
# Generation-only (no go test / muxt check) because building the output needs a
# GOEXPERIMENT=jsonv2 toolchain; the assertions confirm the standard library
# encoding/json/v2 is used and the go-json-experiment backport is never referenced.
muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server --output-jsonv2

grep 'json "encoding/json/v2"' template_routes.go
grep 'json.UnmarshalRead' template_routes.go
! grep 'go-json-experiment' template_routes.go
! grep '"encoding/json"' template_routes.go

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "POST /add Add(ctx, unmarshalJSON(body))" -}}{{- .Result -}}{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.25
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"context"
	"embed"
	"html/template"
	"strconv"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

type Pair struct {
	A int `json:"a"`
	B int `json:"b"`
}

func (Server) Add(ctx context.Context, in Pair) string { return strconv.Itoa(in.A + in.B) }
